A01:2021.name: Broken Access Control
A01:2021.description: Restrictions on what authenticated users are allowed to do are not properly enforced.

A02:2021.name: Cryptographic Failures
A02:2021.description: Failures related to cryptography which often leads to sensitive data exposure.

A03:2021.name: Injection
A03:2021.description: User-supplied data is not validated, filtered, or sanitized by the application.

A04:2021.name: Insecure Design
A04:2021.description: Missing or ineffective control design. Insecure design cannot be fixed by a perfect implementation.

A05:2021.name: Security Misconfiguration
A05:2021.description: Missing appropriate security hardening or improperly configured permissions.

A07:2021.name: Identification and Authentication Failures
A07:2021.description: Confirmation of the user's identity, authentication, and session management is critical.

A08:2021.name: Software and Data Integrity Failures
A08:2021.description: Code and infrastructure that does not protect against integrity violations.

A09:2021.name: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
A09:2021.description: Without logging and monitoring, breaches cannot be detected.

A10:2021.name: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
A10:2021.description: SSRF flaws occur when a web application fetches a remote resource without validating the user-supplied URL.

CWE-787.name: Out-of-bounds Write
CWE-787.description: The product writes data past the end, or before the beginning, of the intended buffer.

CWE-79.name: Cross-site Scripting (XSS)
CWE-79.description: The product does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes user-controllable input before it is placed in output.

CWE-89.name: SQL Injection
CWE-89.description: The product constructs all or part of an SQL command using externally-influenced input.

CWE-416.name: Use After Free
CWE-416.description: Referencing memory after it has been freed can cause a program to crash or execute arbitrary code.

CWE-78.name: OS Command Injection
CWE-78.description: The product constructs all or part of an OS command using externally-influenced input.

CWE-20.name: Improper Input Validation
CWE-20.description: The product receives input but does not validate or incorrectly validates that input.

CWE-125.name: Out-of-bounds Read
CWE-125.description: The product reads data past the end, or before the beginning, of the intended buffer.

CWE-22.name: Path Traversal
CWE-22.description: The product uses external input to construct a pathname without proper neutralization.

CWE-352.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
CWE-352.description: The web application does not verify that a request was intentionally made by the user.

CWE-434.name: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
CWE-434.description: The product allows the upload of dangerous file types that can be processed by the server.

CWE-862.name: Missing Authorization
CWE-862.description: The product does not perform an authorization check when an actor attempts to access a resource.

CWE-476.name: NULL Pointer Dereference
CWE-476.description: A NULL pointer dereference occurs when the application dereferences a pointer that is NULL.

CWE-287.name: Improper Authentication
CWE-287.description: When an actor claims a specific identity, the product does not prove that the claim is correct.

CWE-190.name: Integer Overflow or Wraparound
CWE-190.description: The product performs a calculation that can produce an integer overflow or wraparound.

CWE-502.name: Deserialization of Untrusted Data
CWE-502.description: The product deserializes untrusted data without sufficiently verifying the data is valid.

CWE-77.name: Command Injection
CWE-77.description: The product constructs all or part of a command using externally-influenced input.

CWE-119.name: Improper Restriction of Operations within Memory Buffer
CWE-119.description: The product performs operations on a memory buffer with incorrect boundaries.

CWE-798.name: Use of Hard-coded Credentials
CWE-798.description: The product contains hard-coded credentials for authentication.

CWE-918.name: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
CWE-918.description: The web application fetches a remote resource without validating the user-supplied URL.

CWE-306.name: Missing Authentication for Critical Function
CWE-306.description: The product does not perform authentication for functionality that requires identity.

CWE-362.name: Race Condition
CWE-362.description: The product contains a code sequence that can run concurrently with other code.

CWE-269.name: Improper Privilege Management
CWE-269.description: The product does not properly assign or modify privileges for an actor.

CWE-94.name: Code Injection
CWE-94.description: The product constructs code segments using externally-influenced input.

CWE-863.name: Incorrect Authorization
CWE-863.description: The product performs an authorization check but does not correctly determine authorization.

CWE-276.name: Incorrect Default Permissions
CWE-276.description: During installation, the product sets incorrect permissions for an object.
